span.p:
libero_combined_q99/
dataset_statistics.json
· q01/q99 = MIN/MAX over 4 suites
· mean/std = pooled by num_transitions
· 273 K transitions / 1693 trajectories

div.style: color: rgb(10, 31, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_build_rlds w/ shared_stats:
1. make_dataset_from_rlds(name=spatial,
action_proprio_norm=BOUNDS_Q99,
dataset_statistics=combined_q99)
2. apply_trajectory_transforms (window=1, future=7)
3. .flatten() → frame stream
4. .shuffle(256000)
5. apply_frame_transforms (resize 224)

div.style: color: rgb(10, 31, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(10, 31, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
same pipeline,
name=libero_object,
shared stats = combined_q99

div.style: color: rgb(10, 31, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(10, 31, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
__iter__: each step
idx ~ Categorical(p=[0.25, 0.25, 0.25, 0.25])
yield next(iters[idx])

div.style: color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
per-sample dict:
{ scene_image, wrist_image,
proprio (8,) float32 normalized [-1,+1],
target_action (8, 7) normalized,
action_mask, prompt_input_ids (20,),
prompt_attention_mask, language str,
domain_id (scalar long),
last_action_chunk (8,7) zeros }

div.style: color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
batch dict:
scene_image (B,3,224,224)
wrist_image (B,3,224,224)
proprio (B, 8)
target_action (B, 8, 7)
prompt_input_ids (B, 20)
domain_id (B,) long ← per-sample mix

div.style: color: rgb(59, 39, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
VLAPolicy.forward
· vision_encoder(scene_image)
· DA-2-MLP routes per domain_id row
· soft_prompt_hub(domain_id) → 32-token prefix
· LLM forward (LoRA active)
· action_head + DA-2-MLP action_decoder

div.style: color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(59, 39, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
F.l1_loss(pred, target_action) · action_mask
(target already shared-Q99 normalized via RLDS pipeline)
